verdict.answer_first: A and B both answer in sentence 1: A says "Vitest." and B says "use Vitest."
verdict.decisiveness: A is slightly cleaner: "For a greenfield TS project with no Jest legacy, go Vitest." B also commits, but adds more setup detail.
verdict.fabrication: Both make uncited concrete claims; B is more exposed with "path aliases just run" and "only reruns affected tests".
verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on because it includes "npm i -D vitest" plus config and scripts.
